message:
Add Toggle Developer Tools command

Enable devtools feature in Tauri (hidden by default). Register
view.toggleDevTools as a client-owned extension command so it
appears in the command palette. Handle it in both the keybinding
handler and the palette dispatcher via invoke("toggle_devtools").

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/l2i7fpohi3nx7ly20z4shzn2
